# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We actively maintain and provide security patches to the following versions:

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.0.x   | Yes       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please **do not** open a public issue. Instead, report it privately to:
- SufiyanAasim on GitHub
- 13eeCoder on GitHub

We will review your submission and respond within 48 hours to coordinate a secure release patch.
